idea.original_text: Необходимо через xcode mcp review(или агалогичным способом если не доступно) собрать все проблемы текущего UX и исправить их
idea.normalized_summary: Perform a comprehensive UX audit of the CryptoSavingsTracker application using Xcode MCP tooling and supplementary static analysis to identify all current UX defects, then implement fixes for every issue found.

convergence.note: Score stable at 9.0. Prior blocker (PO-B-01) resolved. New blocker (UX-B-01) is focused and well-scoped. Expect resolution in Revision 3 without score regression.

blocking_issues.title: No success feedback specification for mutation operations (save, create, delete)
blocking_issues.resolution: Add Section 5.21 'Mutation Success Feedback' specifying success banners on parent screens after modal dismissal, delete confirmation inline, haptic feedback, and VoiceOver-extended auto-dismiss timing.

resolved_from_prior.title: Baseline metrics recording must be gated as Phase 0

unresolved_blockers.title: No success feedback specification for mutation operations (save, create, delete)
unresolved_blockers.resolution_required: Add Section 5.21 'Mutation Success Feedback' with success banner spec, per-mutation-type feedback, VoiceOver timing, haptic feedback, and Appendix E entry.

recurring_themes: Success feedback and success banner component underspecified
T2+T3 stacking and animation edge cases
Effort estimate variance and Phase 3.5 iteration budget risk
Onboarding edge cases and post-onboarding flag lifecycle

next_action_detail: Revise proposal to Revision 3 resolving UX-B-01: Add Section 5.21 'Mutation Success Feedback' defining success banner patterns for save/create/delete operations. Update Appendix E with success banner row. Focused addition (~30 min authoring). Then re-submit for fast-track review.
